testcases.input: words = ["abcd","cdab","cbad","xyzz","zzxy","zzyx"] Output: 3 Explanation: One group is ["abcd", "cdab", "cbad"], since they are all pairwise special equivalent, and none of the other strings is all pairwise special equivalent to these. The other two groups are ["xyzz", "zzxy"] and ["zzyx"]. Note that in particular, "zzxy" is not special equivalent to "zzyx".
